allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path apps\) { Write-Output 'apps exists'; Get-ChildItem apps -Directory | ForEach-Object { $_.Name } } else { Write-Output 'no apps dir' })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem packages\\db\\migrations | Select-Object -Last 10 Name; Write-Output '---'; Get-ChildItem packages\\db\\src | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })
